timelines.notes: Fetched 2026-06-20. Aggregated across Al Jazeera's South China Sea topic page (no single AJ article carries 15+ dated entries). Contributing articles: https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2022/6/30/ferdinand-marcos-jr-sworn-in-as-philippines-president ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2023/2/13/philippines-summons-chinese-ambassador-over-laser-incident ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2023/8/5/china-fires-water-cannon-at-philippine-boat-in-south-china-sea ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2023/10/22/chinese-philippine-vessels-collide-at-second-thomas-shoal ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2023/12/9/china-fires-water-cannons-at-philippine-fishing-boats-near-scarborough ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2023/12/10/china-water-cannons-philippine-resupply-boat-at-second-thomas-shoal ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/3/5/philippines-china-clash-at-second-thomas-shoal-injures-sailors ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/3/23/china-rams-philippine-resupply-boat-at-second-thomas-shoal ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/4/11/us-japan-philippines-hold-first-trilateral-summit-at-white-house ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/4/30/three-filipinos-hurt-in-chinese-water-cannon-attack-at-shoal ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/6/17/chinese-forces-injure-philippine-sailor-in-second-thomas-shoal-clash ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/7/21/philippines-china-reach-deal-on-second-thomas-shoal-resupply ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/8/19/philippine-chinese-coast-guard-ships-collide-near-sabina-shoal ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/8/31/china-coast-guard-says-it-took-control-measures-against-philippine-ship ; https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/12/4/china-philippines-accuse-each-other-of-incursions-at-scarborough-shoal . Date approximations per rule 4: Feb 13 2023 entry pegged to summons date (the laser incident occurred Feb 6 — both dates are reported separately). The Apr 30 2024 water-cannon entry may overlap with continuing tensions; AJ anchored on the date a fresh injury count was reported. Source disagreements: Casualty counts at Second Thomas Shoal incidents vary between Philippine Coast Guard, AFP, and Chinese statements; entries written conservatively to use the Philippine reporting that AJ carried. June 17 2024 incident — AJ described 'boarding' by Chinese personnel; CNN described use of bladed weapons (also reported by Manila). Public figures named: Ferdinand Marcos Jr — public official, permitted under rule 6.

Fetched 2026-06-20. Aggregated across CNN's South China Sea coverage (no single CNN article carries 15+ dated entries). Contributing articles: https://www.cnn.com/2022/06/30/asia/marcos-jr-sworn-in-philippines-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2023/02/02/asia/philippines-us-edca-bases-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2023/02/13/asia/philippines-china-laser-incident-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2023/08/05/asia/china-water-cannon-philippine-boat-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2023/10/22/asia/china-philippines-collision-second-thomas-shoal-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2023/12/09/asia/china-water-cannons-philippine-fishermen-scarborough-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2023/12/10/asia/china-water-cannons-philippine-resupply-second-thomas-shoal-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/03/05/asia/philippines-china-water-cannon-injured-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/03/23/asia/china-water-cannons-philippine-boat-second-thomas-shoal-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/04/11/politics/biden-marcos-kishida-trilateral-summit ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/06/17/asia/chinese-coast-guard-bladed-weapons-philippine-boats-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/07/21/asia/philippines-china-second-thomas-shoal-deal-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/07/27/asia/philippines-resupply-brp-sierra-madre-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/08/19/asia/china-philippines-collision-sabina-shoal-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/08/25/asia/philippines-coast-guard-withdraw-sabina-shoal-intl-hnk ; https://www.cnn.com/2024/12/04/asia/china-philippines-scarborough-shoal-incursion-intl-hnk . Date approximations per rule 4: EDCA-bases announcement (Feb 2 2023) is contextual to the South China Sea subtopic — the four additional sites enable US presence near contested waters; pegged to the joint US-Philippines announcement date. The Feb 6 2023 laser incident appears via the Feb 13 summoning entry on AJ's t1 but as a discrete Feb 6 entry on CNN's t2. Source disagreements: June 17 2024 incident — CNN highlighted bladed weapons; AJ described boarding more generally; both descriptions trace to Philippine Armed Forces statements describing Chinese personnel armed with axes and bolos boarding the rigid-hulled inflatables. The injured sailor lost a thumb (per AFP); both timelines kept entries general and refrained from naming the casualty. Public figures named: Marcos Jr, Biden, Kishida — all public officials, permitted under rule 6.

disagreements.topic: Description of June 17 2024 Second Thomas Shoal incident
disagreements.note: AJ described Chinese personnel boarding Philippine boats; CNN highlighted bladed weapons (axes, bolos). Both descriptions trace to Philippine Armed Forces statements. The injured sailor lost a thumb in the encounter, per AFP. Entries written generally to avoid naming the casualty.

CNN's t2 includes the Feb 2 2023 announcement of four additional Enhanced Defense Cooperation Agreement sites; AJ's t1 does not separately list the announcement. The omission is a coverage choice rather than a factual disagreement — AJ folded EDCA developments into broader analysis pieces during the cluster window.
